overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage featuring a futuristic black sports car with distinctive illuminated rear grilles driving through a densely built neon-lit metropolis at night. The vehicle navigates from a covered parking area through urban streets, elevated highways, and underpasses before parking in a commercial lot, showcasing ray-traced lighting and futuristic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a covered concrete parking structure where a futuristic black sports car with illuminated rear grilles reverses and accelerates through narrow alleyways. Pink neon street lights and digital billboards line the route as the vehicle exits the enclosed parking area into the open city.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges onto wider city streets bathed in red and pink neon light, passing under massive concrete overpasses. A silver sedan drives parallel in the left lane as the car approaches a highway entrance, with graffiti-covered walls lining the right side of the road.

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered highway section, the lighting dramatically shifts to vibrant green neon illuminating the tunnel-like structure. The vehicle accelerates through this semi-enclosed space with metal barriers and industrial piping overhead while a white sports car overtakes on the right.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle bursts out of the covered highway into an open elevated roadway with the full city skyline visible ahead. Massive digital billboards illuminate the right side while the car weaves through moderate traffic, with skyscrapers towering in the distance against the night sky.

segments.scene_description: The car exits the highway and turns into a more industrial zone with warehouses and commercial buildings. The ground transitions from asphalt to dirt and gravel as the vehicle enters a parking lot, passing yellow neon signs and chain-link fences.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle pulls into a covered parking space and comes to a stop. The camera transitions to follow a character in a tank top and cap who exits the vehicle and walks away. The parking area features concrete walls and large digital advertisement screens displaying fashion advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a futuristic black sports car as it transitions from a confined concrete parking structure into a vibrant, neon-lit urban highway. It begins within the narrow alleyways of a covered parking area, where the vehicle reverses and accelerates past pink neon lights and digital billboards toward the city exit. As the car emerges onto wider streets, the environment opens up under massive concrete overpasses and graffiti-covered walls, with the lighting shifting to deep red and pink hues while a silver sedan drives parallel. The scene then shifts dramatically as the vehicle enters a covered highway section, where the atmosphere transforms into a tunnel-like space illuminated by vibrant green neon. Finally, the camera follows the car as it accelerates through this industrial corridor of metal barriers and overhead piping, passing a white sports car that overtakes on the right.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a high-speed journey through a neon-lit skyline to a quiet stop in a gritty industrial parking area. It begins as the vehicle bursts from a covered highway onto an open elevated roadway, weaving through traffic beneath towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards. As the car exits the highway, the environment shifts toward an industrial zone where the asphalt gives way to dirt and gravel, passing by chain-link fences and yellow neon signs. The scene then moves into a covered parking space where the vehicle comes to a halt against a backdrop of concrete walls and fashion advertisements. Finally, the camera pivots to follow a character in a tank top and cap as they exit the car and walk away into the shadows.
